news.t: Simplify Provides Estimated Capital Gain Distribution Information for 2025
Introducing the Simplify Government Money Market ETF (SBIL)

overview.description: The Simplify Government Money Market ETF (SBIL) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in investment grade fixed income. The fund is an actively managed fund that invests in US government money market instruments, including overnight repurchase agreements and cash. The fund aims to balance income, liquidity, and capital preservation. SBIL was launched on Jul 14, 2025 and is issued by Simplify.

data.title: Simplify Provides Estimated Capital Gain Distribution Information for 2025
data.text: NEW YORK--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Simplify Asset Management announces that it expects to deliver capital gains distributions across ten ETFs.

data.title: Introducing the Simplify Government Money Market ETF (SBIL)
data.text: NEW YORK--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Simplify launches SBIL, an ETF designed to be of particular use to those investors seeking the stability of a money market fund.
